1.content: How will this story begin?
1.title: Welcome to Gravity Falls

11.content: Which male will shrink in size?
11.title: Single Shrinking (Male)

111.content:
It was a normal day at the Mystery Shack, or as normal as it could be in Gravity falls. Oregon.
Dipper was alone in his and Mabel's room. Dipper was rummaging through his backpack when he pulled out a familiar-looking flashlight.

Dipper’s mind was flooded with the terrible experience he and Mabel had with it.

The preteen shuddered. "I really don't wanna go through that again," Dipper said.

He grabbed the crystal on the front of the flashlight and tried to pull it loose. Suddenly a bird flew by and hit the window. The noise startled Dipper, and he dropped the flashlight, which switched on upon impact.

The beam struck Dipper and almost instantly shrank the boy down to two inches tall. Dipper was now standing before the flashlight, which was massive compared to him.

"Ah, darn it not again!" Dipper shouted.

He walked closer to the flashlight to make sure the crystal was still in one piece. Dipper's eyes widen in fear as he saw the crystal was shattered.


"No, no, this can't be happening!" Dipper panicked. "I need to get help!"

Dipper ran towards the attic door. Thanks to his diminutive size, he could squeeze right under it. Once he was through, he ran into his first obstacle, the attic stairs. Normal this wouldn't be a problem, but

Dipper's shrunken size would make descending done the stairs a long and tedious challenge.

Dipper began his long descend down the stairs. It proved to be much more arduous than his mountain climb to reach the Multi-Bear's lair. By the time he reached the bottom, he was exhausted.


But he couldn't stop now. He needed to find help. As the tiny boy made his way to the gift shop, he pondered on whose help he should get.

"Grunkle Stan? No, no, it would be terrible if he found me like this." Dipper thought.

"Soos?" "He's got a big heart and would help me out of this mess, but he's also really clumsy." Dipper continued.

"So I guess that just leaves, Mabel and Wendy. Dipper said.

The tiny pre-teen made his way into the gift shop and saw...
111.title: Little Dipper

choices: Mabel hears Dipper and notices him on the floor.
Mabel hears Dipper but doesn't notice him.
Mabel doesn't hear Dipper and keeps walking.
1111.content:
It was his cheery, twin sister, Mabel, and from Dipper's current point of view, she towered over him like a skyscraper. "Whoa!" Dipper shouted as he saw Mabel just a few feet away from him.

Considering how imaginative and hyperactive Mabel can be, Dipper had second thoughts about trying to get her attention, but he knew he didn't really have any other choice. With that in mind, the shrunken boy ran from where he was standing and tried to reach his now gigantic sister. However, Dipper was still pretty exhausted from his trek down the stairs and kneeled down to catch his breath when he was hardly even halfway to Mabel.

"Oh man," he panted. "I'm so tired after going down those stairs. At this rate I'll never reach Mabel." Dipper was still kneeling on the floor trying to regain his strength when suddenly... *BOOM BOOM* he felt the ground shake as if it were an earthquake, but unfortunately for him it was much worse than that.

"Oh no," Dipper said as he looked up in fear. Mabel started walking and because of his size, her footsteps were like ground breaking tremors to the tiny Dipper and to make matters worse, she was walking directly in his path. Hey Dipper, you coming down soon? We gotta get going soon," Mabel said loudly. For normal sized people it wasn't too loud but in Dipper's case right now, it was like he was right in front a stereo speaker on maximum volume. He covered his ears but could still hear her booming voice in his head.

Dipper saw that Mabel was heading straight for him and if he didn't act sooner, then her giant feet would squish him like the bug that he is right now, and she wouldn't even know it. "Oh no! I've gotta get Mabel's attention before she crushes me into a pancake!" Dipper shouted standing up. "HEY MABEL! IT'S ME DIPPER! HELP! AND DON'T SQUISH ME!" Dipper shouted up to Mabel while waving his arms quickly and jumping in the air so she would notice him. At his size, he wasn't sure if Mabel would hear him, but it was all he could think of right now.
1111.title: Mabel Pines

choices: Nothing happened and Dipper made it to Mabel's shoulder.
Dipper lost his grip and fell off somewhere.
Mabel felt Dipper and grabs him in her hand.
11112.content:
Dipper was still shouting up to Mabel as loudly as he could, and by this point, he was pretty much out of breath. "Down here, Mabel!" Dipper shouted. He stopped for a second to take a breather and felt like his throat dried up from all the shouting. Fortunately for him, Mabel suddenly stopped walking in her tracks and had a confused look on her face.

"Huh, that's weird. I thought I just heard Dipper," Mabel said in confusion. "Dipper. Where are you?" Mabel turned her head left and right but was still perplexed by the nonexistent sight of her twin brother. "What the? Come on Mabel! Look down here!" Dipper shouted once more, annoyed by the fact that Mabel heard his tiny voice but still didn't notice him. "Oh, come on!" he yelled in frustration.

"Ugh, fine. I guess I'll just have to use the direct approach with her." Dipper decided to stop waiting for Mabel to find him, while risking being a red stain on the sole of her shoe, and walked directly toward his towering titan of a twin. "If she can't find me down here, then I'll just have to go to her." Dipper resumed walking until he was right in front of Mabel's right foot. However, to him her shoe was as big the mystery shack itself, showing him just how tiny he was. It looked like he barely came up to Mabel's big toe, which made him feel more like a bug than a human being right now.

Even though Mabel looked like a gigantic building to him from where he was standing, Dipper still wasn't going to let that stop him from getting back to normal size. He jumped right on top of Mabel's right shoe and tried to get as tight of a grip as he could on it. Despite his 'noodle-like' arms, Dipper managed to grab the fabric of Mabel's sock as well. "That wasn't so hard," he said with confidence. "Now to start climbing. If I can just reach her ear I can definitely get Mabel to help." He took a breath for some good luck. "Here we go!" Dipper yelled, making his way to the front of Mabel's foot to start his climb up her body.

Dipper ran towards the front of Mabel's foot and began his descent up her leg with his hands gripping the sock fabric. Unfortunately for him, Mabel started walking again and made quite a ride for Dipper. "Whoa!" he yelled, trying to hold on to her leg as best as he could. "Well I'm sure it was nothing. I better go and get him myself," Mabel said, walking to the stairs to get to her and Dipper's bedroom.

Gripping Mabel's moving leg felt like one of the swinging rides at an amusement park and had Dipper scared out of his wit holding on for dear life. "Oh man. I can't wait until this is over and I'm back at my full height." Dipper said. He continued climbing up Mabel's leg until he was right inside the rim of her skirt. Knowing what was right above him, Dipper blushed a little bit and did his best not to look up. With that, he tried to swing for the skin of her leg to her skirt and managed to grab the bottom of it in time. "Yes! Almost there. Now if I can just get higher," he said as he continued climbing up the skirt to Mabel's sweater.

"At the sweater, good. Just a little further." He said with a hint of frustration as he was now holding on to the right side of Mabel's sweater, which he thought would be a much more difficult challenge than the previous obstacles.

Dipper tried to get a good grip on Mabel's sweater, but the feel of the fabric didn't make it easy for him. The tiny boy kept on climbing and felt pretty confident when he saw that he was getting closer to Mabel's shoulder. "Alright. I'm so close. Now if I can just get up there...," he said with enthusiasm.

Dipper might make it safely to Mabel's shoulder (in theory), or something might happen that keeps him from getting there (could still be good for his sake). What happens?
11112.title: Mabel hears Dipper but doesn't notice him.

1112.content:
Wendy at her usual spot at the cash register, reading a magazine.
Luckily for Dipper, the gift shop was mostly empty today, so his chances of getting stepped on
weren't as high.

The tiny boy made his way behind the counter and waved frantically at Wendy.
"Hey, Wendy, hey!" The pint-sized boy shouted.

Unfortunately for Dipper, his tiny voice couldn't reach the redhead's ears.
Dipper desperately waved his arms in the air in the hopes that she saw him, but to no avail.
Wendy continued to read her magazine, blissfully unaware of her shrunken friend at her feet.
"Ugh, of course, I'm too small for her to hear me!" Dipper groaned.


Dipper looked up at his now gigantic crush, pondering how he was going to get her attention.
"Maybe I can climb her up to her to ear." Dipper thought out loud.


With that in mind, the two-inch tall boy began climbing up Wendy's giant boot.
Dipper's face beat red as he climbed her pant leg. Never he would have thought he would be this close to Wendy, let alone climbing up her jeans, but desperate times call for desperate measures.

Dipper makes it over Wendy's knee and onto her thigh.
He takes a moment to catch his breath as he lays on top of her thigh.

Wendy, still unaware of her tiny companion, put her feet up on the counter, sending her minuscule friend tumbling down onto her lap.

Dipper picked himself up off the floor and immediately looked up at Wendy.

He was halfway to her shoulders. All he had to do next was climb her stomach and then arriving at climb over her breast.
Dipper's face was as red as a tomato, but he knew in his heart that this would be worth it in the end.
The two-inch boy began crawling up Wendy's flannel shirt, his heart pounding in his chest. He could not believe he was doing this; it was all so surreal.

He finally reached her breasts.
From Dipper's perspective, Wendy's breasts were like small hills, and being against them this way made him blush quite heavily. Climbing over the roundness of them was a tad difficult, but he managed to do it.
Finally, he reached Wendy's neck, and he stared up at the giantess before him.
Dipper called out to Wendy again, hoping she could hear him.
'Wendy, Wendy, can you hear me?' Dipper shouted.
1112.title: Climbing Mt. Corduroy

info.brief_description: Giantess / Shrinking story about females from Gravity Falls.
info.description:
-No killing characters
-No giant males
-No Blood and Gore
-No Scat
-No Toilet stuff
-No one sentence chapters (unless you are adding a chapter with multiple options)
-Minimum of 300 words
-F/F or F/M interaction only
